improvements.message: Your EAPM of 19 is quite low. This means you're not giving enough commands, leading to idle units and idle economy.
advice: Learn and drill hotkeys: Q/W/E for military buildings, H for TC
Practice the 'TC check loop': every few seconds, tap H to check your TC
Use control groups: select army, press Ctrl+1. Now press 1 to select them anytime
Play against the AI to practice multitasking without pressure
Watch T90's 'Low ELO Legends' for common mistakes to avoid

improvements.message: At 1231 ELO (Intermediate), the biggest gains come from economy fundamentals.
advice: Zero idle TC time is the #1 skill - always be making villagers until 120+ pop
Learn 2-3 build orders by heart (scouts, archers, fast castle)
Don't forget eco upgrades: Double-Bit Axe, Horse Collar, etc. on time
Scout your opponent in Feudal to know if you need to defend or attack

player_reports.name: Lone Wolf
strengths: Highest activity on your team (EAPM: 20 vs team avg: 15)

improvements.message: Your EAPM of 20 is quite low. This means you're not giving enough commands, leading to idle units and idle economy.

improvements.message: Resigned in a long game. Late game is about trade, map control, and composition switches.
advice: Set up trade early (by 35 minutes) - gold wins late games
Learn trash unit transitions: halberdiers + skirmishers when gold runs out
Control relics for trickle gold income
Don't forget trebuchets - you need siege to close out games

improvements.message: As Berbers, leverage your unique strengths.
advice: Cheaper stable units (15/20% discount). Camel Archers are excellent vs. other archer civs. Strong on open maps.
Study pro replays of Berbers on YouTube
Master your unique units: Camel Archer, Genitour
Key bonus: Villagers move 10% faster.

player_reports.civ_advice: Cheaper stable units (15/20% discount). Camel Archers are excellent vs. other archer civs. Strong on open maps.
civ_bonuses: Villagers move 10% faster.
Stable units are 15%/20% cheaper in the Castle/Imperial Age.
Ships move 10% faster.

player_reports.civ_advice: Guecha Warriors heal allies on death. Temple Guards ramp up attack speed. Cheap age-ups and healing Settlements.
civ_bonuses: Advancing to the next Age costs -50% gold.
Settlements cost -25% and heal allied units within 3 tiles by 5/10/15/15 HP/min in Dark/Feudal/Castle/Imperial Age.
The Champi Scout line and Archery Range units have +1/2/3 melee armor in the Feudal/Castle/Imperial Age.
Monks regain faith 100% faster.
